title: Grok AI: What It's Actually For

modules.title: What Grok Is, Who Made It, and How It's Different
modules.sub: Meet xAI's chatbot and what sets it apart
modules.description: You explore Grok's origins as xAI's flagship AI and map out how its design philosophy differs from ChatGPT, Gemini, and other mainstream tools. By the end, you can clearly explain what makes Grok distinct and why that actually matters for how you use it.

modules.title: Getting Started: Interface, Access, and First Prompts
modules.sub: Log in, look around, and send your first real prompts
modules.description: You navigate Grok's interface, understand what's free versus paid, and run your first prompts to get a feel for how it responds. This hands-on orientation builds the baseline confidence you need before diving into more specific use cases.

modules.title: Where Grok Shines: Real-Time Info and Edgy Questions
modules.sub: Discover what Grok does better than most AI tools
modules.description: You test Grok's real-time web access on live topics and explore how its less filtered tone handles questions other AI tools shy away from. You develop a clear mental model of the scenarios where Grok is genuinely the right tool to reach for first.

modules.title: Using Grok for Research, Writing, and Daily Tasks
modules.sub: Put Grok to work on practical, everyday challenges
modules.description: You run Grok through real workflows — researching breaking topics, drafting content, summarising information, and handling everyday queries. You walk away with a personal playbook of prompts and use cases that fit your actual routine.

modules.title: Grok's Weaknesses and When to Use Something Else
modules.sub: Know Grok's limits and choose smarter across AI tools
modules.description: You audit the situations where Grok underperforms — from accuracy gaps to task types better suited to other tools — and practise making fast, informed decisions about which AI to use for a given job. You finish the course with a confident, balanced view of Grok's real place in your AI toolkit.

synopsis: Grok is xAI's answer to ChatGPT, and it's worth knowing what it actually does differently â especially its real-time web access and less filtered responses. This course cuts through the hype and shows you exactly when and how to use it as a practical everyday tool.
rationale: Grok has significant search interest among young adults but almost no structured educational content exists to help them evaluate it honestly against other tools they already use.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can use Grok effectively for real-time research and everyday AI tasks, and make informed decisions about when it outperforms or underperforms other AI tools.
